input.content:
How to surface reasoning tokens (Agents SDK, <=200 words)

1) Enable/request reasoning in the Agents SDK / Responses API
- Agents SDK (Python/TS): set ModelSettings.reasoning = Reasoning(effort="medium", summary="detailed") when constructing your Agent or Runner.
- Responses API: include reasoning artifacts with include=["reasoning.encrypted_content"] to receive the encrypted chain-of-thought item (or default reasoning item id).
- Streaming events: listen for response.reasoning_text.delta and response.reasoning_summary_text.delta (Responses streaming) to get reasoning deltas.

2) Minimal Python client-side streaming snippet (forward deltas to a WebSocket UI)

from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI()
for event in client.responses.stream(model="o4-mini", input="Explain...", include=["reasoning.encrypted_content"]):
    if event.type == "response.reasoning_text.delta":
        ws.send(json.dumps({"type":"reasoning.delta","delta":event.delta}))
    if event.type == "response.done":
        ws.send(json.dumps({"type":"response.done"}))

3) Reliable source
https://developers.openai.com/cookbook/examples/responses_api/reasoning_items
